subclasses.name: Path of the Ancestral Guardian
subclasses.description: Calls upon ancestral spirits to protect allies and hinder foes with spectral warriors from beyond.

subclasses.name: Path of the Berserker
subclasses.description: Channels raw fury into devastating attacks, entering a frenzied rage that overwhelms enemies through relentless aggression.

subclasses.name: Path of the Storm Herald
subclasses.description: Harnesses primal elemental power, surrounding themselves with desert heat, sea storms, or tundra cold.

subclasses.name: Path of the Totem Warrior
subclasses.description: Bonds with animal spirits, gaining bear resilience, eagle perception, or wolf pack tactics in battle.

subclasses.name: Path of the Zealot
subclasses.description: Warrior fueled by divine fury, dealing extra radiant damage and becoming nearly impossible to kill.

subclasses.name: College of Glamour
subclasses.description: Wields fey magic to charm and inspire, cloaking allies in protective majesty and beguiling enemies.

subclasses.name: College of Lore
subclasses.description: Master of knowledge and versatile magic, cutting down foes with words and stealing spells from others.

subclasses.name: College of Swords
subclasses.description: Combines blade work with bardic magic, performing deadly flourishes that entertain and devastate simultaneously.

subclasses.name: College of Valor
subclasses.description: Warrior-poet who inspires allies in combat, granting battle magic and fighting alongside the party.

subclasses.name: College of Whispers
subclasses.description: Manipulator who uses secrets and fear as weapons, impersonating others and striking with psychic vengeance.

subclasses.name: Forge Domain
subclasses.description: Master of fire and metal, blessing equipment and conjuring searing flames in worship of craftsmanship.

subclasses.name: Grave Domain
subclasses.description: Guardian of life's threshold, denying undeath and ensuring enemies and allies meet death at proper time.

subclasses.name: Knowledge Domain
subclasses.description: Seeker of truth and learning, reading minds and speaking all languages in pursuit of wisdom.

subclasses.name: Life Domain
subclasses.description: Premier healer who restores vitality with unmatched efficiency, keeping allies alive through divine restoration.

subclasses.name: Light Domain
subclasses.description: Wields radiant fire to banish darkness, burning enemies and protecting allies with brilliant flames.

subclasses.name: Nature Domain
subclasses.description: Bridge between civilization and wilderness, commanding plants and animals while channeling nature's divine power.

subclasses.name: Tempest Domain
subclasses.description: Storm caller who commands thunder and lightning, dealing maximum damage and repelling foes with divine winds.

subclasses.name: Trickery Domain
subclasses.description: Deceptive agent of chaos, creating illusions and duplicates while blessing allies with stealth and misdirection.

subclasses.name: War Domain
subclasses.description: Divine warrior granting extra attacks and weapon blessings, leading allies with martial prowess and holy strikes.

subclasses.name: Circle of Dreams
subclasses.description: Fey-touched healer who restores allies from range and teleports through hidden pathways of the Feywild.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Land
subclasses.description: Draws power from terrain, recovering spell slots and casting environment-specific magic tied to their homeland.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Moon
subclasses.description: Supreme shapeshifter taking powerful beast forms, fighting as animals with enhanced combat wild shapes.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Shepherd
subclasses.description: Summons and empowers spirits and beasts, surrounding themselves with protective animal totems and superior conjurations.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: Elven archer weaving magic into arrows, unleashing supernatural shots that seek, explode, or bind targets.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: Tactical combatant who executes calculated maneuvers, controlling battlefield through precision strikes and clever techniques.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: Mounted knight and stalwart defender, protecting allies by marking enemies and excelling in opportunity attacks.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: Perfect warrior achieving physical peak through enhanced criticals, remarkable athletics, and pure martial prowess.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: Blends weapon and spell, bonding with armaments and weaving evocation and abjuration magic into combat.

subclasses.name: Samurai
subclasses.description: Disciplined warrior granting themselves advantage through fighting spirit, striking with elegant precision and unwavering resolve.

subclasses.name: Way of the Drunken Master
subclasses.description: Unpredictable fighter using swaying movements, redirecting attacks and stumbling between foes with deceptive grace.

subclasses.name: Way of the Four Elements
subclasses.description: Channels elemental power through ki, casting spell-like disciplines to control fire, water, air, and earth.

subclasses.name: Way of the Kensei
subclasses.description: Weapon master treating blades as extensions of self, turning any weapon into a monk weapon.

subclasses.name: Way of the Open Hand
subclasses.description: Quintessential monk mastering unarmed combat, manipulating ki to heal, harm, or perform incredible physical feats.

subclasses.name: Way of Shadow
subclasses.description: Ninja employing stealth and deception, teleporting through shadows and passing unseen using darkness itself.

subclasses.name: Way of the Sun Soul
subclasses.description: Channels radiant ki into searing bolts and burning strikes, projecting light as destructive ranged energy.

subclasses.name: Oath of the Ancients
subclasses.description: Guardian of light and life, wielding fey magic to protect nature and kindle hope against darkness.

subclasses.name: Oath of Conquest
subclasses.description: Dominating warrior crushing enemies' will, spreading fear and ruling conquered foes through overwhelming power.

subclasses.name: Oath of Devotion
subclasses.description: Ideal knight upholding justice and honor, shining with sacred light while protecting the innocent.

subclasses.name: Oath of Redemption
subclasses.description: Seeks peace over violence, protecting allies and offering enemies redemption through mercy and nonlethal options.

subclasses.name: Oath of Vengeance
subclasses.description: Relentless hunter sworn to punish wrongdoers, channeling divine wrath to hunt down and destroy their quarry.

subclasses.name: Beast Master Conclave
subclasses.description: Bonds with animal companion, fighting alongside loyal beast that grows stronger as partnership deepens.

subclasses.name: Gloom Stalker Conclave
subclasses.description: Deadly ambusher thriving in darkness, invisible to darkvision and striking first with devastating surprise attacks.

subclasses.name: Horizon Walker Conclave
subclasses.description: Planar guardian detecting portals and striking across dimensions, teleporting and dealing force damage to extraplanar threats.

subclasses.name: Hunter Conclave
subclasses.description: Versatile slayer choosing combat techniques to hunt single prey, multiple foes, or defend against attacks.

subclasses.name: Monster Slayer Conclave
subclasses.description: Expert in hunting supernatural threats, gaining protection against magic and sensing creatures' vulnerabilities.

subclasses.name: Arcane Trickster
subclasses.description: Blends illusion magic with thievery, using mage hand and enchantments to misdirect and deceive.

subclasses.name: Assassin
subclasses.description: Master of disguise and death, gaining advantage on initiative and dealing automatic criticals to surprised targets.

subclasses.name: Inquisitive
subclasses.description: Detective uncovering lies and weaknesses, gaining insight bonuses and using perception to land sneak attacks.

subclasses.name: Mastermind
subclasses.description: Tactician granting allies advantage, mimicking accents and knowing two languages, excelling in manipulation and planning.

subclasses.name: Scout
subclasses.description: Skirmisher with superior mobility and nature skills, excelling at hit-and-run tactics and wilderness survival.

subclasses.name: Swashbuckler
subclasses.description: Charismatic duelist gaining sneak attack through panache, moving freely without provoking opportunity attacks in melee.

subclasses.name: Thief
subclasses.description: Quick-fingered burglar with fast hands, climbing speed, and ability to use magical items regardless of restrictions.

subclasses.name: Draconic Bloodline
subclasses.description: Dragon-blooded caster with natural armor, bonus damage to chosen element, and eventual wings.

subclasses.name: Divine Soul
subclasses.description: Touched by gods, accessing cleric spells alongside sorcerer list and channeling divine healing or destructive energy.

subclasses.name: Shadow Magic
subclasses.description: Darkness incarnate seeing in magical dark, summoning shadow hound, and resurrecting through death's defiance.

subclasses.name: Storm Sorcery
subclasses.description: Tempest-born caster flying after casting spells and dealing thunder or lightning damage to nearby attackers.

subclasses.name: Wild Magic
subclasses.description: Chaos incarnate triggering random magical surges, bending luck with advantage or disadvantage through wild tides.

subclasses.name: Archfey
subclasses.description: Pact with fey lord granting charm abilities, misty escape, and power to dominate creatures' wills.

subclasses.name: Celestial
subclasses.description: Blessed by heavenly being, adding radiant damage to attacks and healing allies through celestial resilience.

subclasses.name: Fiend
subclasses.description: Devil's bargain granting temporary hit points on kills, resistance to damage, and ability to hurl foes.

subclasses.name: Great Old One
subclasses.description: Alien pact enabling telepathy, reflecting mental attacks, and creating thralls from shattered minds.

subclasses.name: Hexblade
subclasses.description: Sentient weapon pact enabling charisma-based attacks, bonus damage curses, and summoning shadowy specter servant.

subclasses.name: School of Abjuration
subclasses.description: Master of protective magic, creating arcane wards that absorb damage and dispel hostile spells.

subclasses.name: School of Conjuration
subclasses.description: Summons creatures and objects from thin air, teleporting short distances and creating permanent minor items.

subclasses.name: School of Divination
subclasses.description: Sees future through portents, manipulating fate by replacing rolls and gaining superior initiative.

subclasses.name: School of Enchantment
subclasses.description: Mind controller splitting enchantments between targets, charming multiple creatures, and altering memories.

subclasses.name: School of Evocation
subclasses.description: Destructive caster shaping explosive spells to protect allies, overchanneling magic for maximum damage.

subclasses.name: School of Illusion
subclasses.description: Reality bender making illusions partially real, becoming invisible and crafting believable false visions.

subclasses.name: School of Necromancy
subclasses.description: Commands undead armies, regaining health from kills and eventually becoming lich-like through undead thralls.

subclasses.name: School of Transmutation
subclasses.description: Matter manipulator changing objects' properties, transmuting materials, and eventually transforming into other creatures.

subclasses.name: School of War Magic
subclasses.description: Combat mage boosting defense when casting, deflecting attacks, and maintaining concentration through arcane deflection.
